marketHeadlines.headline: Apple (AAPL) Faces Memory Shortages And Tata Ransomware Leak Ahead Of iPhone 18 Pro
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Two supplier-side hits at once — chip shortage and a Tata ransomware leak — landing right as iPhone 18 Pro ramps. Watch for margin guidance slippage on the next print.

marketHeadlines.headline: TSLA Broken Wing Butterfly Trade Targets A Profit Zone Between 360 and 400
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Options flow clustering in the 360–400 zone signals dealers and large traders are positioning for a range-bound Tesla into the print, not a directional breakout.

marketHeadlines.headline: NVDA Stock Eyes Worst First Half Since 2022 As Board Member Trims Stake For Third Time This Year
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Insider selling on a third occasion this year, into a first-half drawdown not seen since 2022. Sentiment signal, not a fundamental reset, but worth flagging.

marketHeadlines.headline: Loop Says Apple (AAPL) Is Looking to China for Memory Supply Relief
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Apple turning to Chinese memory suppliers is a sign the DRAM crunch is real and persistent — not a one-quarter noise item.

marketHeadlines.headline: Tesla (TSLA) Delivery Outlook Improves as Morgan Stanley Keeps Equal Weight Rating
marketHeadlines.whyItMatters: Morgan Stanley acknowledging improving deliveries while holding Equal Weight is the bull-bear compromise — better numbers already priced.

institutional.regulatoryRadar: ESMA's MiCA warning on Binance EU service changes is the standout regulatory story of the day — EU-wide scope, not just one venue.
institutional.sovereign: Solana Company backing Kazakhstan's $6B crypto megacity push is the largest sovereign-aligned crypto capital commitment in the feed this morning.

creatorIntel.sentimentNote: Crypto tape cooling on ESMA and MiCA friction; AI tape cautious into quarter-end with insider trims at NVDA. No clear directional call from creator feeds this morning.

aiRace.headline: Virtusa and UnifyApps Announce Strategic Partnership to Accelerate Enterprise AI Adoption with 'Assembly-First' Methodology
aiRace.whyItMatters: Enterprise integration shops are now co-marketing AI assembly methodologies — the 'build vs. compose' debate is migrating from startups to the SIs.

aiRace.headline: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years
aiRace.whyItMatters: A 35-year rotation signal into small caps is the kind of breadth shift that historically precedes multi-quarter regime changes — watch for follow-through in July.

aiRace.headline: Why did OpenAI delay rollout of its latest artificial intelligence model?
aiRace.whyItMatters: Frontier model rollouts hitting friction right as competitive pressure from labs and open-source accelerates — capability is outrunning deployment readiness.

aiRace.headline: Google restricts Meta's use of Gemini
aiRace.whyItMatters: Google throttling Meta's access to Gemini is the first major hyperscaler-vs-hyperscaler API rationing event — signals model access is becoming a strategic chokepoint, not a commodity.

supplement: TWS offline — portfolio state and rate watch not refreshed this run.
retirement.actionItem: Once TWS is back, scan for any overnight moves in MSTR/STRK/STRF/STRD before the open.

health.move: Stand up and walk for two minutes between back-to-back briefs.
